_comment: slack-reactor app, Socket Mode + bot events. Add this to the existing 'mukuls_bot' app (api.slack.com/apps → that app) rather than creating a new one, so its bot token stays the one in $SLACK_BOT_TOKEN. Socket Mode delivers BOT events, so the bot only receives events in channels (or DMs) it has been /invite-d to. Per-machine routing is by $TODO_EMOJI (and/or one app per machine). M5 wave-2 SCOPE DECISION (design §9): the DEFAULT ingest is @-mentions (app_mention) + DMs (message.im) ONLY — NOT a channel firehose. app_mention + message.im feed the read-only bin/connectors/slack-events.py connector (spooled to ~/.assistant/connectors/slack/spool/); the reactor still never sends a message. To opt INTO plain channel/group message ingestion, add message.channels/message.groups to bot_events below AND set SLACK_INGEST_CHANNELS=1 for the reactor. REQUIRED after ANY change here: manually re-upload this manifest to the app AND reinstall it (a scope/event change forces OAuth re-consent) — see README 'Re-import the manifest' — else the added scope is never granted and the connector silently produces nothing.

display_information.name: mukuls_bot
display_information.description: React an emoji on a thread to capture it as a /todo
